productDisplayName: Fila Men's Caliber White Grey Shoe
description: Well cushioned and lightweight, the running shoes are designed to offer a comfortable running experience coupled with style. Team this with jeans and tees for a cool casual look.Upper Meshed upper for maximum ventilation and durability Synthetic overlays for durability, added structure to the upper and midfoot support Reinforced overlay over heel cup for extra support to the back foot Reinforced overlay over toe box for durability and added protection to the forefoot Symmetrical lace-up system for snug Fit and protection from blistering Synthetic laces for durability Padded tongue with synthetic upper overlay for durability and meshed fabric lining below for comfort and breathability Cushioned sock liner for in step comfort and snug fit Brand name on side and tongue Midsole EVA midsole for lightweight comfort and better shock absorption Cushioned EVA foam footbed for enhanced impact protection and comfort Arched footbed supports ergonomic fit Outsole Outsole with multi-directional pattern for superior grip Flex grooves for greater flexibility of the feet Scooped out heel for less shock on impact Impact guidance system for natural motion of the feet shoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, cloth or brush, cold water and mild detergent to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierAvoid storing shoes in extremely hot conditions or in sunlight
